entries.title: Forge — Claude Code harness
entries.summary: Installation, update, uninstall, and feature overview for the Forge Claude Code scaffold (v0.4.0). Knowledge-layer model: 13 slash commands, 12 skills, 6 subagents, 7 hooks. Pipeline commands removed; use Speckit or your own tool for implementation.

entries.title: Working Agreement for Claude
entries.summary: Persistent session rules loaded into every Claude Code conversation: detect-stack, find-reuse, TDD, canonical-sources-first, and project-constitution non-negotiables.

entries.title: Building a Claude Harness — design rationale
entries.summary: Long-form write-up of the harness design: CLAUDE.md + project constitution, 12 skills (including ast-search), 6 subagents, 7 hooks, MCP, settings. v0.4.0 pivot: knowledge-layer model, pipeline removed, Speckit context injection.

entries.title: /forge.constitution — create and manage the project constitution
entries.summary: Slash command: interactive authoring of .forge/constitution.md, injected every session via session-start.sh and post-compact.sh.

entries.title: Project constitution
entries.summary: Soul file: project purpose, non-negotiables, architectural principles, risk posture, team conventions, out-of-scope items. Loaded every session.

entries.title: /forge.research — produce a structured research brief
entries.summary: Slash command: runs research-topic skill to produce a canonical-sources-first research document at .forge/NNN-slug/research.md. Includes official doc citations, codebase findings, options comparison, and a recommendation.

entries.title: research-topic skill
entries.summary: Five-phase research workflow: topic intake, codebase scan, option enumeration via official docs, analysis (feasibility/complexity/risk/fit), and structured document assembly using research-doc-schema.

entries.title: ast-search skill
entries.summary: Structural code search using ast-grep (primary) or semgrep (fallback). Reads ast_search_tool from stack.json, returns file:line matches by code shape. Called by find-reuse; also available standalone via /forge.ast-search.

entries.title: /forge.ast-search — structural code search
entries.summary: Slash command: runs ast-search skill to find code by shape using ast-grep or semgrep. Returns file:line matches.

entries.title: /forge.context — export context snapshot
entries.summary: Slash command: writes .forge/context-snapshot.json aggregating stack.json, stale doc-index entries, and latest research brief path. Single integration point for external tools.

entries.title: speckit-context-inject hook
entries.summary: UserPromptSubmit hook: detects /speckit.* commands and injects additionalContext with current stack summary and stale doc count. Requires no Speckit-side changes.

entries.title: Integration guide — context handoff protocol
entries.summary: Documents the file-based context handoff (context-snapshot.json), UserPromptSubmit hook pattern for Speckit and other tools, and context snapshot JSON schema.
